name: split_widget
title: PDF Splitter Tutorial
description: Learn how to split PDF files into smaller documents

steps.text:
📁 Add PDF Files to Split

Click here to select PDF files you want to split. You can select multiple files to process them in batch.

💡 Tip: You can also drag and drop files directly!

📂 Scan Directory Feature

Want to add all PDFs from a folder? Click here to scan an entire directory! This feature is available on all widgets that work with files.

💡 Great for batch processing multiple files at once!

📋 File List

Your selected PDF files appear here. You can:
• Remove files by selecting and pressing Delete
• Reorder files by dragging
• See file details and page counts

⚙️ Split Options

Choose how to split your PDFs:
• Page Range: Split at specific page numbers
• Page Count: Split into equal chunks
• Extract Pages: Pull out specific pages

📂 Output Directory

Select where your split PDF files will be saved. The default output directory can be changed in Settings.

🚀 Start Processing

Ready to split your PDFs? Click here to begin! Watch the progress in the status bar below.
